case_title: HANNON, NEILL VS BUDGET RENT-A-CAR SYSTEMS INC. et al

docket_entries.description: TO BE HEARD AT 11:00 AM ON SEPT. 3, 1998.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: JUL-30-1998 AS TO DEFENDANT SEARS, ROEBUCK & CO.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION MOTION TO TAX COST OF SEP-03-1998, GRANTED
PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR FEES & COST IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $107.10
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: JUL-30-1998 AS TO DEFENDANT BUDGET RENT-A-CAR SYSTEMS INC.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT BUDGET RENT-A-CAR SYSTEMS INC. HEARING SET FOR AUG-31-1998 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HANNON, NEILL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUDGET RENT-A-CAR SYSTEMS INC. SEARS, ROEBUCK & CO. $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $126.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SEARS, ROEBUCK & CO.

THIS IS A MOTION TO AWARD COST, NOT TO TAX COST.
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF SEP-03-1998, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT SEARS, ROEBUCK & CO.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HANNON, NEILL AS TO DEFENDANT BUDGET RENT-A-CAR SYSTEMS INC. SEARS, ROEBUCK & CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-16-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ADDRESS CORRECTION FOR BUDGET RENT-A-CAR SYSTEMS FILED;
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT SEARS, ROEBUCK & CO. HEARING SET FOR AUG-31-1998 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506

OEX OFF CALENDAR. JUDGEMENT SATISFIED.
